title: ruizia mauritiana
intro: Ruizia mauritiana, also known as the Mauritius ruizia or Mauritius dodonaea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Anacardiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ruizia mauritiana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, although further research is needed to fully understand its uses and effects.
